productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's Purple Yellow Logo T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue polo neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with front buttoned placket, short sleeves with trim, cut out at the hem, brand embroidery on left chest and number '06' appliqué d on the right armFittingComfort Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Designed with its classic brand logo on the chest and made of breathable fabric, this classic polo t-shirt is a perfect casual wear. The short sleeves with trim provide a traditional timeless style for men. Wear it as a classic t-shirt when you are golfing, or don it as a semi-formal wear to work. Pair it with chinos and suede shoes for a great corporate look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'1", Chest-38", Waist-32"
